indicators.name: Asking price index
indicators.notes: Vendor price expectations.

indicators.name: Asking rent
indicators.notes: Rental market strength.

indicators.name: Auction clearance rate
indicators.notes: Final weekly capital-city and Cotality-published weighted combined-capitals clearance rate.

indicators.name: Auction volume
indicators.notes: Final weekly capital-city and combined-capitals auction totals from Cotality.

indicators.name: Auction withdrawn rate
indicators.notes: Weekly capital-city withdrawn auctions divided by auctions reported from Domain public auction results.

indicators.name: Building approvals
indicators.notes: Future dwelling supply.

indicators.name: Current suburb recent sales count
indicators.notes: Recent sales count shown by the source.

indicators.name: Current suburb rental listings
indicators.notes: Weekly postcode rental listing stock from SQM Research, summed across listing-age bands.

indicators.name: Current suburb sale listings
indicators.notes: Monthly postcode sale listing stock from SQM Research, summed across listing-age bands.

indicators.name: Days on market
indicators.notes: Selling speed.

indicators.name: House median value 12 month change
indicators.notes: Monthly suburb house value momentum from source market trends.

indicators.name: House rental rate 12 month change
indicators.notes: Weekly annual change calculated from SQM Research all-house asking rents.

indicators.name: Housing lending commitments
indicators.notes: Credit demand confirmation.

indicators.name: Investor housing credit
indicators.notes: RBA monthly national investor housing credit balance.

indicators.name: New listings
indicators.notes: Fresh supply entering the market.

indicators.name: Owner-occupier housing credit
indicators.notes: RBA monthly national owner-occupier housing credit balance.

indicators.name: Rental vacancy rate
indicators.notes: Rental supply pressure.

indicators.name: Suburb off-market property count
indicators.notes: Approximate off-market stock shown by the source.

indicators.name: Total listings
indicators.notes: Inventory available for sale.

indicators.name: Unit median value 12 month change
indicators.notes: Monthly suburb unit value momentum from source market trends.

indicators.name: Unit rental rate 12 month change
indicators.notes: Rolling 12 month unit rental rate momentum from source market trends.

sourceRegister.notes: Uses the public ABS release chart and Table 10 workbook for national and Greater Capital City monthly history.
Uses the public ABS release chart table for quarterly dwelling loan commitments.

sourceRegister.sourceName: RBA D2 Lending and Credit Aggregates
sourceRegister.notes: Monthly national housing credit balances. Macro context rather than suburb-level signal.

sourceRegister.geography: Combined capital cities and individual capital cities
sourceRegister.notes: Weekly Cotality auction results. Final weighted combined-capitals results are preferred; official preliminary weekly results are retained as an explicitly flagged fallback where the public final archive is unavailable. Published same-week prior-year comparators support the two-year trend.
Free public weekly capital-city table retained only for withdrawn-rate observations.

sourceRegister.sourceName: SQM Research Postcode Listings and Asking Rents
sourceRegister.notes: Two-year postcode history from SQM public charts for personal reference: monthly sale listings, weekly rental listings, and weekly house asking-rent annual change.
Best fit for suburb-level leading indicators. Needs API access/terms confirmation.
